titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale Student Examinations Collection
titlestmt.author: compiled by Manuscripts and Archives Staff

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday December 3, 2020 at 08:01

did.abstract: The records consist of administrative materials concerning examinations and samples of Yale examinations, syllabi, reading lists, teaching aids, completed examinations, and grades.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 47 (YRG 47), Collections documenting teaching and learning in Yale academic programs.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is partially restricted. See inventory for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale Student Examinations Collection (RU 249). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized in four series: I. Exam and Class Administration. II. Examinations. III. Curricula. IV. Completed exams, grades; and subsequent accessions.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of administrative materials concerning examinations and samples of Yale examinations, syllabi, reading lists, teaching aids, completed examinations, and grades.

did.unittitle: Biennial Exam Senior Class Junior Class
Prize Problems, Biennial Exams Sophomore Class
Annual Exam Prize Probs, Sophomore Class
W. W. DeForest Scholarship Examination Junior Class
Prize Problems Proposed To The Sophomore Class
Schedule Of Term Exams In The Academical Department Of Yale College
Subjects For Townsend Compositions And DeForest Ovation
Prize Problems Presented To The Sophomore Class

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

did.unittitle: Subjects For Winthrop Prize, Townsend Composition, DeForest Oration

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

did.unittitle: Term Exams In Courses Given By Prof. J. C. Schwab Class
Woolsey Scholarship Exams and Freshman Scholarship Exams
Bound Volumes of Exams - Yale College
Completed Exams of P Harper Y. 1868
Completed Exams of H. W. Cofrancesco Y. 1926 L. 1929
Grade Reports and Papers of Prof. W. H. Dunham, Jr.
The Communist Theory and State: A Statement and Criticism , E. Wright
English and Philosophy examinations and suggested reading list of English literature
Examination questions, notes and entrance exam of Walter S. Sanford
